prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.0L TFSI (engine code: **CAEB**) from a VW MK6 GTI, retaining the original Karmann Ghia subframe with custom motor mounts from **Karmann Ghia Restoration (KGR)** for seamless fitment. Pair with a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (56 trim, .64 A/R turbine housing) and a **Precision 4650 intercooler** (bar-and-plate core, 22x6x3.5" dimensions) to handle 300+ WHP on E85 fuel. Custom **02A 6-speed transmission** swap with a **Peloquin limited-slip differential** and **South Bend Stage 3 Clutch** for durability.

Full **AEM Infinity 7** standalone ECU with **Bosch Motorsport 0280158861** 1000cc injectors and a **Walbro 450 LPH E85-compatible fuel pump**. Custom **3" stainless steel exhaust** with **SCORPION 2.5" center muffler** (resonated) and **Burns Stainless 4-2-1 merge collectors** for optimized scavenging. **Mocal oil cooler (13-row)** and **Setrab 270-series coolant radiator** to manage heat under sustained boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** (custom valving for Karmann Ghia’s 1,200 lb weight) paired with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** (1.2" drop) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (22mm front, 19mm rear). **Powerflex Black Series polyurethane bushings** for the rear trailing arms and **Meyle HD control arms** to eliminate slop. **AP Racing CP5270 front brake calipers** (4-piston) with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (330mm x 32mm) and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for stopping power.
estetica: Full **Rocket Bunny V1 Karmann Ghia widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders with 3" flares) paired with a **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (2.5" overhang) and **Voltex-style rear diffuser** (integrated tow hooks). **OEM+ color-matched** in **VW L80E Pastel Blue** with **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and A-pillars for contrast.

Custom **BBS RS-GT wheels** (15x8 +15 front, 15x9 +20 rear) with **Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires** (195/50/15 front, 225/50/15 rear). **Hella Rallye 1000 headlights** (H4 conversion) with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **Lux H8 Angel Eyes** (6000K). **Custom aluminum side-exit exhaust tips** (2.5" diameter, brushed finish) from **Stainless Works**.

Interior stripped and refinished with **Recaro SRD-E seats** (Karmann Ghia-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in **Bridge of Weir leather** (two-tone: Pastel Blue and Cream). **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) on a **NRG quick-release hub**. **Defi BF gauges** (boost, oil pressure, wideband) mounted in a **custom aluminum A-pillar pod**. **Sound deadening via Kilmat 80 mil** and **Focal Utopia Be tweeters** (door-mounted) with a **JL Audio 500/1 amp** for audio clarity.
